msg_idle_warning: %s in %d seconds. Move the mouse, press any key, or close this notice to cancel.
msg_autostart_disabled: IdleTrigger will no longer start with Windows.
cli_usage:
Usage: IdleTrigger <command>

Commands:
  sleep        Put the PC to sleep
  hibernate    Hibernate the PC
  shutdown     Shut down Windows
  restart      Restart Windows
  lock         Lock the workstation
  nosleep      Stay Awake (on|off|toggle|status)
  monitor      Idle monitor (on|off|status)
  diagnostics  Raw idle timing (idle [--watch])
  autostart    Start with Windows (enable|disable|status)
  config:reload Reload the running tray configuration
  status       Show current status
  version      Show version
cli_error_sleep_unavailable: Sleep is not available on this system.
cli_error_hibernate_unavailable: Hibernation is not available on this system.
cli_error_tray_not_running: The tray application is not running.
cli_error_nosleep_requires_tray: Stay Awake requires the tray application to remain running.
cli_error_monitor_requires_tray: The idle monitor requires the tray application to remain running.
warning_config_defaults: Warning: failed to load the configuration; using defaults:
config_edit_hint: Changes apply automatically within a few seconds. Restart IdleTrigger or run config:reload to apply them immediately.
cli_unknown: Unknown command. Run without arguments to start the tray icon.
tip_lock: Lock the current Windows session immediately.
tip_quick_actions: Lock, sleep, hibernate, shut down, or restart the computer. Save your work and use these actions with care.
tip_sleep: Put the system to sleep immediately. This fails if sleep is unavailable.
tip_hibernate: Hibernate the system immediately. Windows hibernation must be enabled.
tip_shutdown: Shut down Windows immediately. Save your work first.
tip_restart: Restart Windows immediately. Save your work first.
tip_nosleep: Prevent automatic system sleep. Configure keep_screen_on and battery policy in the config file.
tip_process_watch: When Stay Awake is enabled, keep awake only while a listed exe is running; no match means no keep-awake request. This does not enable Stay Awake by itself and does not affect idle monitoring.
tip_process_watch_empty: No applicable processes are configured. Add exe names to process_watch_list in IdleTrigger.toml. An empty list means Stay Awake is not process-limited and idle monitoring is not affected.
tip_process_watch_configured:
Match status: %s.
Applicable processes: %s.
Stay Awake keeps the system awake only while enabled and one of these processes is running; no match means no keep-awake request.
tip_idle: Run the selected action after this many minutes without keyboard or mouse input. Idle monitoring pauses while Stay Awake is active.
tip_idle_warning: Show a non-activating reminder before the idle action. Disable it to run the action directly; set its duration in IdleTrigger.toml.
tip_idle_enhanced: Use this when Windows idle time is refreshed on a fixed interval and actions cannot trigger. IdleTrigger learns the pattern and keeps a more robust timer; normal keyboard or mouse input still resets it.
tip_idle_timeout: Choose how long keyboard and mouse input must be idle before the idle action runs.
tip_idle_action: Choose whether reaching the idle time triggers sleep, hibernate, shut down, or lock.
tip_theme: Automatically switch Windows light/dark theme by fixed time or sunrise/sunset. Sunrise mode uses manual coordinates first, optional IP location second, then timezone, UTC offset, and fallback location.
tip_fullscreen: Pause automatic theme switching while a fullscreen app is active.
tip_battery_theme: Switch to dark mode on battery and restore by schedule when AC power returns.
tip_ip_location: Use ipwho.is to estimate the city from your public IP for sunrise/sunset times. Successful results are cached in memory for 24 hours; failures retry after 30 minutes. Set coordinates in the config file to avoid network lookup.
tip_theme_switch: Immediately switch between the light and dark themes once.
tip_theme_repair: Reapply and broadcast the current theme when some windows or displays did not update.
tip_hotkeys: Enable global hotkeys: Win+Shift+S sleep, Win+Shift+L lock, Win+Shift+N toggle Stay Awake.
tip_autostart: Start in the tray after Windows sign-in. The startup path is repaired automatically.
tip_logging: Write debug logs to IdleTrigger.log. Enable while diagnosing issues; keep off otherwise.
tip_language: Changes apply immediately and are saved to the config file.
tip_config: Open IdleTrigger.toml in Notepad. Advanced settings such as applicable processes, theme mode, and coordinates are edited there.
tip_exit: Exit the tray app and stop Stay Awake, idle monitoring, hotkeys, and theme scheduling.
